name: Spinach Sauce
recipeIngredient: 1 package frozen spinach, cooked and drained of all water
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the cooked and drained spinach, minced garlic, onion powder, salt, and pepper in a blender.
2. Add half of the vegetable broth to the blender and blend until smooth. If needed, add more vegetable broth for a thinner consistency.
3. Transfer the blended mixture back to a saucepan and heat until hot.
4. Serve over rice or pasta.
